summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kevin AI Interviewer Platform's voice-first redesign. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Voice-first interview page successfully implemented with Kevin avatar center-stage, microphone button, text input fallback, transcript toggle, timer, and question counter. End-to-end interview flow working including AI evaluation and report generation with detailed charts and scores.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/auth/me returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
Backend API /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session token test_voice_session_123
Backend API /api/start-interview creates new interview with AI first message
Backend API /api/next-question returns AI follow-up responses
Backend API /api/end-interview generates evaluation report with detailed scores
Backend API /api/reports returns list of user reports
Backend API /api/reports/{report_id} returns specific report with charts data
Backend API /api/profile returns user profile information
Backend API /api/voice/transcribe endpoint reachable and authenticated
Landing page renders correctly with dark theme and hero elements
Voice-first Interview page renders with Kevin avatar center-stage
Large microphone button for voice input present and clickable
Text input fallback working for typing answers
Interview timer displays correctly in MM:SS format
Question counter shows current question number (Q1, Q2, etc.)
Mute toggle button present and functional
Transcript toggle shows/hides conversation messages correctly
End Interview button works with confirmation dialog
Voice waveform visualization elements present
Kevin speaking animation states working
Can send text answers via input field and receive AI responses
End-to-end interview flow: start → answer questions → end → report generation
Report detail page shows radar chart, bar chart, individual scores
Report detail page displays strengths and weaknesses sections
Dashboard page loads with sidebar navigation and action cards
Navigation between dashboard, interview, and reports pages working
Session-based authentication working with test credentials
AI interview integration with GPT-4o-mini working correctly
Dark theme UI with proper contrast and Outfit typography
